# George Popescu Biography

> A life across engineering, trading technology, entrepreneurship, photography, and writing — and the principles that matter when you build things that last.

George Popescu Biography documents the journey of a multi-exit founder, engineer, and entrepreneur. The site covers his background in trading technology, bootstrapped companies, and the principles he believes matter for building durable businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](https://georgepopescubiography.com/): Overview of George Popescu's life and career
- [About George Popescu](https://georgepopescubiography.com/about.html): Full biography
- [Insights](https://georgepopescubiography.com/insights.html): Lessons and reflections
- [Contact](https://georgepopescubiography.com/contact.html): Get in touch

## Key Articles

- [George Popescu: A Practical Profile](https://georgepopescubiography.com/george-popescu-a-practical-profile.html)
- [Building What Survives the Cycle](https://georgepopescubiography.com/george-popescu-building-what-survives-the-cycle.html)
